name: bolid-tester
description: Generic OBD2/EOBD diagnostics app (React Native/Expo). Documentation-driven — see docs/.
comment_phase2_dependencies: The React Native UI layer (Phase 2) adds these runtime deps, installed on a developer machine / EAS (they require a native build and cannot run in the remote container): expo, expo-dev-client, expo-router, react, react-native, react-native-ble-plx, react-native-svg, zustand, tamagui, @tamagui/config.
